Tokenomics

Tokenomics & Revenue Share

Contract Address - 0xd289ea09aeece390629e9414d41b4d9d9bf43fd9

AI Technology also grants $AITEK holders the opportunity to participate in revenue sharing generated from trades executed on the platform. This means that the more the platform is utilized, the greater the benefits accrued by token holders. This feature serves as an additional incentive for holding $AITEK, offering a tangible advantage to its holders as they share in the platform's success.


5% Buy & Sell Tax on $AITEK distribution -

  • 1% tax to holders as revenue share, staking
  • 1% tax to create and fund new leverage liquidity pools
  • 1% of tax will be used to develop further and deliver new advancements to our platform
  • 2% tax for our marketing campaigns
STAKING
Leveraging made easy, secure & original

The AI TEK Advantage

Unparalleled Flexibility

One of the key advantages of trading on TEK is the flexibility it offers. You are not locked into your position until a predetermined expiration date. Instead, you have the freedom to close your position at any time. This means you can capture profits or cut losses according to your trading strategy and market conditions, giving you greater control over your investments.


Trade Now

Leverage Options

TEK provides users with the option to select their desired level of leverage. You can choose from leverage ratios of 2x, 5x, or 10x, depending on your risk tolerance and trading strategy. Higher leverage amplifies potential gains but also increases the risk of significant losses. The platform calculates a liquidation price based on your chosen leverage, at which point your position may be automatically closed to limit potential losses.

Trade now
Leveraged Markets

Boosted Markets By Leverage

  • Different Leverage Options: 2x , 5x , 10x Different Leverage Options Amplify your crypto game with customizable leverage. Choose from 2x, 5x, or 10x to tailor your investment strategy to your ambition. Dive into a world where greater control meets enhanced returns
  • Leverage Both Sides LONG or SHORT In the dynamic world of crypto investments, flexibility is key. Our platform allows you to leverage both sides of the market to your advantage. Opt for a LONG position to capitalize on a rising market or go SHORT to benefit from a potential decline. Tailor your strategies, seize opportunities, and maximize your gains with unprecedented fluidity.
learn now
Leveraged Trading

Trade Your Way: Web dApp & Telegram Bot

  • Web dApp - A Full-Fledged Experience Dive into a comprehensive trading environment tailored to those who seek depth and sophistication in their crypto ventures. Our web dApp not only offers an intuitive interface but also integrates powerful tools and features to streamline your trading activities. It's more than just a trading platform; it's your all-in-one investment hub.
  • Telegram Bot - Swift & Efficient For traders on the move, speed and accessibility matter. That's why we've harnessed the power of Telegram to deliver a bot that lets you trade in real-time, without missing a beat. Whether you're on a coffee break or transiting between meetings, our Telegram bot ensures your trading opportunities are always just a message away.
